must_detect.matched_text: Warranties and disclosures: no undisclosed litigation; a legacy patent dispute was settled and publicly announced on 12 January 2024; no profit forecast will be issued.

Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Investment in Azure Bauhinia Technologies Limited (Main Board stock code 9X99, illustrative only) by Nacre Peak Capital Fund IV, L.P.
Transaction: subscription for a minority stake with an option to increase subject to a whitewash waiver; no immediate change of control and no general offer required under the Takeovers Code.
This summary reflects the previously announced framework per the issuer’s 3 March 2025 public announcement; figures are placeholders and subject to final circulars.
Structure: placing under General Mandate together with unsecured convertible notes; expected classification as a discloseable transaction under Chapter 14 of the Listing Rules.
Conditions precedent: approval for listing of the consideration shares by the Exchange, consent of the securities regulator for the whitewash waiver, independent shareholders’ approval, and confirmation of no material adverse change.
Compliance: the issuer confirms ongoing obligations under the SFO regarding inside information; no MNPI to be shared except as already in the public domain.
Funding: proceeds from Nacre Peak Capital Fund IV (Cayman partnership); no leverage at SPV level; settlement bank account masked ref AC-88**-HK and custodian code CU-0X0 (invalid format).
Governance: Investor entitled to nominate one non-executive director; reserved matters limited to further issuance of securities and connected transactions; no management rights.
Employment and integration: no change to existing contracts; any retention or bonus schemes to be separately approved; HR enquiries via hr@azurebauhinia.example (role mailbox).
Personal data and PDPO: only anonymised, aggregated HR metrics (e.g., headcount c. 210, average tenure 3.1 years) to be provided to the Investor; individual personnel files will not be shared.
Intentional positive: for onboarding verification only, the designated operations analyst (non-director) employed since 2019, residing in Pearl View district, DOB 07/1988, assigned device ID ABT-MB-7742, and payroll account suffix 4458 will interface with the Investor’s SPV administrator; no personal names are recorded in this term sheet.
Warranties and disclosures: no undisclosed litigation; a legacy patent dispute was settled and publicly announced on 12 January 2024; no profit forecast will be issued.
Announcements: circulars and announcements to be prepared in accordance with the Listing Rules; any pre-vetting to be sought from the relevant authorities; investor communications through ir@azurebauhinia.example and the issuer announcements website.
Standstill and exclusivity: 6-month standstill on on-market purchases without prior consultation with the Exchange; no exclusivity fee and no break fee.
Governing law and dispute resolution: governed by the laws of Hong Kong; disputes to be referred to arbitration administered by the Kowloon Arbitration Forum; counterparties acknowledge that this term sheet is non-binding except for confidentiality and costs.
